title: Cuter 'Mons
description: Ever play Cobblemon and think "Hmm, this Pokemon looks kinda off"? Well have I got the pack for you!
body:
What does this pack do?:
- This pack strives to give your Pokémon that cute and classic appearance, while still fitting into that Vanilla Cobblemon style!

What changes are included?:
- This pack changes the texture of some Pokémon to smooth out some of the rough details that are present in Vanilla Cobblemon, such as those derpy and sometimes even unnerving eyes, (I'm looking at you, Wooper) as well as adds some emissive textures to some parts of the Pokémon that normally don't have it.

Which Pokémon are changed?
- Just Meowscarada for now, since it's the starter I chose and is the main reason why I decided to make this pack in the first place, but more will be added in the future! 

Which Pokémon will be added in the future?
- That's for you guys to decide! If you want me to make changes to any Pokémon, feel free to leave me some suggestions or requests via the Cobblemon Discord server, just ping me @jochip and I'll take note of your suggestion :D


[This Texture pack is a work in progress and is subject to change, so please leave a follow if you're interested in where this project goes, I promise you won't be disappointed!]
